place: 49/44 Moo 5, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Forested-Hillside Sea-View Villa with Full Staff & Chef - Plai Laem
note: Fully staffed · private chef · breakfast & airport transfers included
blurb: A fully-serviced villa set into a protected tropical forest on the Plai Laem peninsula, on Koh Samui's quiet north-east coast. The bedroom count flexes from three to five to suit your party, and every stay comes with a resident team and a private chef. North-facing sea views run out over the treetops toward the water, an infinity pool spills toward the horizon, and pale contemporary interiors are hung with oversized original artwork.
detail:
On the Plai Laem peninsula, at the quiet north-east corner of Koh Samui, this fully-serviced villa is folded into a hillside of protected tropical forest. The greenery gives it real seclusion — the sides and rear are wrapped in jungle — while the front opens north across the treetops to the Gulf of Thailand, with the tiered rooftops of Plai Laem temple below and the water beyond.

The home is arranged for easy tropical living, with high ceilings drawing the sea breeze through open volumes and generous glass keeping the outlook in view from almost every room. Interiors are calm and contemporary — palettes of white, soft grey and black set against natural wood — and hung with huge, one-off paintings and sculpture that give each space its own character.

Outside, an infinity pool runs toward the edge of the hillside and appears to spill into the forest and sea beyond, framed by a stone sun terrace, shaded daybeds and lounge seating built for long afternoons and golden sunsets. It is a place to do very little, in complete privacy, with the island falling away below.

The villa is offered in a flexible three-, four- or five-bedroom configuration, so the house can be sized to your group. Each bedroom is en-suite, with the primary suites opening to the view; there are five and a half bathrooms in the full layout. Bedrooms are finished in the same restrained palette, with quality linens and considered lighting.

Every stay is fully staffed. A resident team looks after daily housekeeping, a dedicated villa manager is on hand throughout, and a full-time private chef cooks to your preferences, with breakfast included each morning. Complimentary round-trip airport transfers make arrival and departure effortless. Choeng Mon and Plai Laem's beaches, the Big Buddha temple, Fisherman's Village and Samui's markets and restaurants are all a short drive away.

features.l: North-facing sea views over the forest
Minutes from Choeng Mon & Big Buddha
